claims.text: Existing approaches to modeling and generating 3D human-object interactions often rely on score distillation from text-to-image models.
claims.source_quote: Existing approaches often rely on score distillation from text-to-image models...

claims.text: Results from existing approaches to modeling and generating 3D human-object interactions suffer from the Janus problem.
claims.source_quote: ...but their results suffer from the Janus problem...

claims.text: Results from existing approaches to modeling and generating 3D human-object interactions do not follow text prompts faithfully.
claims.source_quote: ...and do not follow text prompts faithfully...

claims.text: The scarcity of high-quality interaction data affects the fidelity of results from existing approaches to modeling and generating 3D human-object interactions.
claims.source_quote: ...due to the scarcity of high-quality interaction data.

claims.text: Hoi3DGen generates high-quality textured meshes of human-object interaction that follow the input interaction descriptions precisely.
claims.source_quote: We introduce Hoi3DGen, a framework that generates high-quality textured meshes of human-object interaction that follow the input interaction descriptions precisely.

claims.text: Hoi3DGen curates realistic and high-quality interaction data leveraging multimodal large language models.
claims.source_quote: We first curate realistic and high-quality interaction data leveraging multimodal large language models...

claims.text: Hoi3DGen creates a full text-to-3D pipeline.
claims.source_quote: ...and then create a full text-to-3D pipeline...

claims.text: Hoi3DGen achieves orders-of-magnitude improvements in interaction fidelity.
claims.source_quote: ...which achieves orders-of-magnitude improvements in interaction fidelity.

claims.text: Hoi3DGen surpasses baselines by 4-15x in text consistency.
claims.source_quote: Our method surpasses baselines by 4-15x in text consistency...

claims.text: Hoi3DGen surpasses baselines by 3-7x in 3D model quality.
Hoi3DGen exhibits strong generalization to diverse categories and interaction types.
claims.source_quote: ...exhibiting strong generalization to diverse categories and interaction types...
